all.en: This morning I tried to log into my email but the password was rejected.
all.zh: 今天早上我試著登入電子信箱，但密碼卻被拒絕了。

all.en: I tried three more times before the system locked my account completely.
all.zh: 我又試了三次，系統就把我的帳號完全鎖住了。

all.en: A warning message told me to contact customer support right away.
all.zh: 一則警告訊息要我立刻聯絡客服。

all.en: I clicked the help link and was placed in a long online queue.
all.zh: 我點擊求助連結，被排進一個漫長的線上等候隊伍。

all.en: After forty minutes, a friendly agent named Lisa finally answered.
all.zh: 四十分鐘後，一位名叫麗莎的友善客服終於接通了。

all.en: She asked me several security questions to verify my identity.
all.zh: 她問了我幾個安全問題以確認我的身分。

all.en: Unfortunately, I could not remember my old recovery phone number.
all.zh: 很遺憾，我想不起我舊的救援電話號碼。

all.en: She suggested I upload a photo of my ID card for further checks.
all.zh: 她建議我上傳身分證照片以便進一步驗證。

all.en: Twenty minutes later, my account was finally restored.
all.zh: 二十分鐘後，我的帳號終於恢復了。

all.en: Lisa kindly reminded me to set up two-factor authentication.
all.zh: 麗莎親切地提醒我要設定雙重驗證。

all.en: I thanked her and promised to write down my passwords from now on.
all.zh: 我向她道謝，並承諾從今以後會把密碼記下來。

all.en: That evening, I sat down and created a strong, unique password for every account.
all.zh: 當晚，我坐下來為每個帳號設定了一個強而獨特的密碼。

all.en: I installed a trusted password manager that my coworker had recommended last month.
all.zh: 我安裝了一款值得信賴的密碼管理工具，那是同事上個月推薦的。

all.en: It generated long, random passwords that no human could ever remember alone.
all.zh: 它會產生又長又隨機的密碼，沒人能單靠記憶記住。

all.en: I also updated my recovery email and added a backup phone number for safety.
all.zh: 我同時更新了救援信箱，並為了安全加上一組備用手機號碼。

all.en: The next morning, my bank app asked me to confirm a new login attempt.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我的銀行 App 要求我確認一筆新的登入嘗試。

all.en: Thanks to two-factor authentication, I quickly blocked the suspicious request from abroad.
all.zh: 多虧雙重驗證，我迅速擋下了那筆來自國外的可疑請求。

all.en: I reported the incident, and the bank froze my card to prevent any damage.
all.zh: 我通報了這起事件，銀行也凍結了我的卡片以避免任何損失。

all.en: My friends laughed when I started lecturing them about online security at lunch.
all.zh: 我吃午餐時開始向朋友們大談網路安全，他們忍不住笑了起來。

all.en: Still, two of them updated their passwords that same afternoon just to be safe.
all.zh: 不過其中兩位還是在當天下午更新了密碼，就為了多一份保障。

all.en: Being locked out had taught me a lesson I would never forget again.
all.zh: 被鎖在帳號外的經驗，給了我一個永遠不會忘記的教訓。

all.en: Two weeks later, our company sent an email about a new cybersecurity training session.
all.zh: 兩週後，我們公司寄了一封關於新網路安全訓練課程的電子郵件。

all.en: I volunteered to attend the workshop and share important tips with my whole team.
all.zh: 我自願參加工作坊，並與整個團隊分享重要的安全知識。

all.en: The instructor explained how hackers used stolen passwords from leaked online databases.
all.zh: 講師說明駭客如何利用從外洩線上資料庫取得的密碼。

all.en: He showed shocking examples of how easily weak passwords could be cracked.
all.zh: 他展示了令人震驚的範例，說明弱密碼如何輕易被破解。

all.en: I returned to the office and created a short guide for my coworkers.
all.zh: 我回到辦公室後，為同事們寫了一份簡短的使用指南。

all.en: My manager liked the guide so much that she shared it across all departments.
all.zh: 我的主管非常喜歡那份指南，把它分享到所有部門。

all.en: Within a week, the IT team noticed a clear drop in suspicious login attempts.
all.zh: 短短一週內，資訊部門就發現可疑登入嘗試明顯減少。

all.en: My friends began asking me to check their security settings on weekends.
all.zh: 朋友們開始在週末請我幫忙檢查他們的安全設定。

all.en: I happily helped them, sharing the lessons that one frightening morning had taught me.
all.zh: 我樂於幫忙，將那個驚險早晨教會我的經驗一一分享給他們。

all.en: That single locked account had quietly changed how my entire circle treated online safety.
all.zh: 那一個被鎖的帳號，悄悄改變了我整個生活圈看待網路安全的方式。

all.en: Six months later, the company invited me to speak at their annual security conference.
all.zh: 六個月後，公司邀請我在他們的年度資安大會上演講。

all.en: I shared my story honestly, admitting how careless I had been with old passwords.
all.zh: 我誠實地分享自己的故事，坦承過去對舊密碼是多麼粗心大意。

all.en: The audience applauded warmly because many had faced similar frightening situations themselves.
all.zh: 觀眾報以熱烈的掌聲，因為許多人也曾面臨類似的驚險處境。

all.en: A security expert offered me a part-time role helping write friendly training materials.
all.zh: 一位資安專家邀請我擔任兼職，協助撰寫平易近人的培訓教材。

all.en: I created short comics that explained complex security ideas through funny daily scenes.
all.zh: 我創作了短篇漫畫，用有趣的日常情境來說明複雜的資安觀念。

all.en: My nephew read the comics and taught his entire class about safe online habits.
all.zh: 我侄子讀了這些漫畫後，向全班同學分享安全的上網習慣。

all.en: His teacher emailed me, asking permission to print the comics for other school classrooms.
all.zh: 他的老師寫信給我，請求授權把漫畫印給學校其他班級使用。

all.en: I gladly agreed, refusing payment because spreading awareness mattered more than any income.
all.zh: 我欣然同意，並婉拒費用，因為傳播安全意識比任何收入都更重要。

all.en: Lisa from customer support sent me a kind note after seeing my work online.
all.zh: 客服的麗莎在網路上看到我的作品後，捎來一封溫暖的短信。

all.en: She said helping one stressed customer had quietly created a ripple of safer habits.
all.zh: 她說當初幫助一位焦急的客戶，悄悄激起了一波更安全習慣的漣漪。

all.en: A year later, a small publisher invited me to compile my comics into a paperback book.
all.zh: 一年後，一家小型出版社邀請我把漫畫集結成平裝書出版。

all.en: The book featured friendly characters facing real-world online dangers and learning safer habits.
all.zh: 書中描繪友善的角色面對現實中的網路危險，並學習更安全的習慣。

all.en: Schools across three cities adopted the book as part of their digital citizenship curriculum.
all.zh: 三座城市的學校把這本書納入數位公民課程的教材中。

all.en: My nephew proudly showed his teacher's signed copy to everyone visiting our family home.
all.zh: 姪子驕傲地把老師簽名的那本書展示給每位造訪我家的客人。

all.en: The IT department at my office invited me to redesign their internal training videos.
all.zh: 我公司的資訊部門邀請我重新設計他們內部的訓練影片。

all.en: I added gentle humor and short animations that even nervous beginners could easily understand.
all.zh: 我加入溫和的幽默感和簡短動畫，連緊張的初學者也能輕易理解。

all.en: My manager was promoted and recommended me for a permanent role designing security education.
all.zh: 主管升職後，推薦我擔任設計資安教育的正式職位。

all.en: Lisa from customer support visited my office during a national cybersecurity awareness week.
all.zh: 客服的麗莎在全國資安意識週期間造訪我的辦公室。

all.en: We finally met in person and shared coffee, laughing about that fateful locked morning.
all.zh: 我們終於本人見面，共享咖啡，笑談那個命運般被鎖住的早晨。

all.en: One careless password had quietly redirected my entire career toward protecting other people.
all.zh: 一個粗心的密碼，悄悄將我整個職涯導向保護他人的方向。

all.en: Lisa and I co-wrote a small handbook for ordinary office workers about gentle daily cybersecurity habits.
all.zh: 麗莎和我合著了一本小型手冊，為普通上班族介紹溫和的日常網路安全習慣。

all.en: We avoided technical jargon, choosing instead to share short personal stories from real grateful users.
all.zh: 我們避開技術術語，改以真實感激用戶的簡短個人故事來呈現。

all.en: Our company printed copies for every new employee orientation across each domestic and international office.
all.zh: 我們公司為每一場新員工訓練印製本書，涵蓋國內外所有辦公室。

all.en: One quiet intern emailed us, saying the handbook had helped her secure her elderly mother's online banking.
all.zh: 一位安靜的實習生寄信來，說這本手冊幫她保護了年邁母親的網路銀行帳戶。

all.en: Her mother had nearly lost her entire savings to a smooth scam impersonating her own grown daughter.
all.zh: 她母親差點被一個冒充自己已成年女兒的高明詐騙騙走全部積蓄。

all.en: Lisa flew over for a small celebration, and we three shared coffee in my office one quiet morning.
all.zh: 麗莎飛來參加小型慶祝會，我們三人在某個安靜的早晨於我辦公室共飲咖啡。

all.en: The intern brought homemade dumplings prepared early that morning by her newly protected gentle mother.
all.zh: 那位實習生帶來她重獲安心的溫柔母親一早親手包的水餃。

all.en: We three ate quietly while light snow fell softly outside the office's tall warm wooden window.
all.zh: 我們三人安靜地吃著，辦公室高大溫暖的木窗外，雪花輕柔地飄落。

all.en: A small framed photograph of that quiet morning now hangs gently above my office wooden bookshelf.
all.zh: 如今那個安靜早晨的小張照片，被裱起來溫柔地掛在我辦公室的木書架上方。

all.en: One careless password had quietly grown into many warm dumplings shared between newly safer grateful families.
all.zh: 一個粗心的密碼，已悄悄成長為許多溫暖的水餃，在新獲安全的感激家庭之間溫柔分享。

all.en: By the following spring, our handbook had been translated into five languages by volunteer professional translators worldwide.
all.zh: 到了次年春天，我們的手冊已由全球志工專業譯者翻譯成五種語言。

all.en: An elderly center in Vietnam requested a thousand copies for their weekly digital literacy workshops.
all.zh: 越南一間長者中心索取了一千本，用於他們每週的數位識讀工作坊。

all.en: Their director wrote that grandmothers there were learning to safely video call grandchildren overseas.
all.zh: 他們的中心主任寫道，當地的奶奶們正在學習如何安全地與海外孫子視訊通話。

all.en: Lisa proposed donating one handbook copy for every paid copy sold through our local publisher.
all.zh: 麗莎提議，透過我們在地出版社每售出一本，就捐贈一本手冊給有需要的人。

all.en: Within a year, twenty thousand free copies had reached community centers across rural Taiwan and Southeast Asia.
all.zh: 短短一年內，兩萬本免費手冊送達了台灣鄉村與東南亞各地的社區中心。

all.en: I quietly hung the Vietnamese translation above my office desk as my daily working compass.
all.zh: 我安靜地把越南文譯本掛在辦公桌上方，作為我每日工作的指南針。

all.en: The intern, now a full-time engineer on my team, led our first overseas training trip to Hanoi.
all.zh: 那位實習生如今已是我團隊的全職工程師，帶領了我們第一次前往河內的海外培訓行程。

all.en: She brought her mother along to meet the grandmothers learning to protect their first smartphones safely.
all.zh: 她帶著母親一同前往，與正在學習安全使用第一支智慧手機的奶奶們見面。

all.en: Grandmothers from two countries shared homemade snacks and laughed about their shared near-disasters with online scams.
all.zh: 兩國的奶奶們分享自製點心，笑著談論她們各自險些遭遇的網路詐騙。

all.en: One forgotten password had truly grown into a soft bridge linking grandmothers across many borders and oceans.
all.zh: 一個被遺忘的密碼，已真正成長為一座柔軟的橋樑，跨越眾多國界與海洋連結著奶奶們。

all.en: By the third year, our grandmother password workshops had expanded into nine countries across Asia and Europe combined.
all.zh: 到了第三年，我們的奶奶密碼工作坊已擴展至亞洲與歐洲合計九個國家。

all.en: Volunteers translated our gentle teaching booklets into Korean, Vietnamese, Italian and even rural Romanian dialects last winter.
all.zh: 志工們在去年冬天將我們溫柔的教學手冊翻譯成韓文、越南文、義大利文，甚至偏鄉羅馬尼亞方言。

all.en: A Romanian grandmother sent a handwritten letter saying our booklet had saved her from losing her entire pension savings.
all.zh: 一位羅馬尼亞奶奶寄來一封手寫信，說我們的手冊讓她免於失去全部退休金存款。

all.en: She had nearly given her password to a stranger on the phone before remembering our small printed warning illustration.
all.zh: 她差點在電話中把密碼告訴陌生人，幸好想起我們小小印刷版的警示插圖。

all.en: Her letter was framed inside our headquarters, beside dozens of similar thank-you notes from grandmothers worldwide.
all.zh: 她的信被裱框掛在我們總部裡，旁邊還有數十封來自世界各地奶奶類似的感謝信。

all.en: An international news network featured our small grandmother network during a documentary about quiet community digital safety.
all.zh: 一家國際新聞網在一部關於安靜社區數位安全的紀錄片中，介紹了我們的小型奶奶網絡。

all.en: Donations arrived from companies wanting to fund free password manager subscriptions for grandmothers in low-income rural communities.
all.zh: 捐款陸續從希望資助偏鄉低收入社群奶奶免費密碼管理器訂閱的公司湧入。

all.en: We trained one hundred new volunteers that same year, each pairing personally with a grandmother in another country.
all.zh: 我們同年培訓了一百位新志工，每位都與另一個國家的一位奶奶個別配對。

all.en: Letters, photographs and small handmade gifts now travel quietly between grandmothers and volunteers across many borders weekly.
all.zh: 書信、照片與小巧的手作禮物，如今每週安靜地在許多國界之間的奶奶與志工之間穿梭。

all.en: One forgotten password had truly grown into a quiet worldwide bridge of grandmothers, volunteers and softly protected memories.
all.zh: 一個被遺忘的密碼，已真正成長為一座安靜的全球橋樑，連結著奶奶、志工與被溫柔守護的記憶。
